violations.description: Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light in the stockroom did not have lights that are shielded.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Lights in the storeroom off the kitchen were not shielded.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee coat was stored on boxes of waffle and pancake mix in the storeroom.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
